title: Quel fantasma di mio marito
writer: Gino De Santis, Camillo Mastrocinque, Antonio Pietrangeli
actors: Walter Chiari, Mady Saint-Michel, Enzo Biliotti
plot: Gianni Alberti is a journalist who is sent to Palestine. He decides to fake a fatal accident so he can then return home as a hero. But things don't turn out as planned, Gianni end up coming back to Italy, but only as a ghost.
